login.heroSubtitle: Register in a second. No email, no password.

embedded.title: Authentication required
embedded.panelTitle: Please connect your wallet to continue

currencySelector.moneriumDescription: Best for easy IBAN transfers. Your users can fund their wallets directly via bank transfer, making it simple for non-crypto users.
currencySelector.circleDescription: Best for blockchain-native users. Widely used across DeFi platforms and exchanges.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

boundary.retryAria: Try again to reload this content

campaign.title: Campaign Not Found
campaign.message: The campaign you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.

critical.title: Critical Error
critical.message: A critical error occurred. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.

dataLoad.title: Failed to Load Data
dataLoad.message: Unable to load {{resourceName}}. Please check your connection and try again.

merchantNotFound.title: Merchant Not Found
merchantNotFound.message: The merchant you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.

header.demoBadgeTitle: Demo mode is active. Click to manage settings.

empty.title: Welcome to Frak
empty.description: You don't have any merchant yet. Add one to start running campaigns.

filters.maxGreaterThanMinError: Max interactions should be greater than minimum

audience.title: Audience
audience.minMember: You need at least 1 member to continue

members.platformAdminNotice: Member data is not available in platform-admin read-only mode.

campaign.label: Campaign name
campaign.hint: Internal name used to identify this notification campaign. Members will not see it.
campaign.minLength: The campaign name requires at least 5 characters
campaign.maxLength: The campaign name can't exceed 100 characters

content.title: Notification content
content.description: Create the push notification your members will receive.

notificationTitle.label: Notification title
notificationTitle.min: The notification title requires at least 8 characters
notificationTitle.max: The notification title can't exceed 40 characters

message.label: Notification message
message.min: The message requires at least 10 characters

image.label: Image URL
image.hint: Optional. Display an image in the notification when supported by the device.

audience.title: Audience
audience.description: Choose which members should receive this notification.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.description: Choose when this notification should be sent.

now.label: Send immediately
now.description: Send as soon as it's published.

later.label: Schedule for later
later.description: Choose a date and time for delivery.

schedule.required: Pick a date and time for delivery

preview.title: Your notification title
preview.message: Your notification message will appear here.

leave.title: Leave notification setup?
leave.description: You've started creating a push notification. If you leave, any information you've entered will be lost.

delete.title: Delete push notification
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete “{{title}}”? This action can't be undone.

basics.label: Campaign basics
basics.subtitle: Name your campaign and choose the merchant it belongs to.

goals.label: Goals
goals.subtitle: The choice of your goal defines the event that generates the distribution of rewards.

territory.label: Territory & categories
territory.subtitle: Choose where your campaign will run and declare any special advertising categories.

budget.label: Budget & schedule
budget.subtitle: Set your campaign budget and timeline. Frak takes a 20% commission on the total budget.

reward.label: Reward setup
reward.subtitle: Choose how rewards are calculated and who qualifies.

validation.label: Campaign validation
validation.subtitle: Review all settings before publishing. All fields are read-only at this stage.

validation.publishError: Couldn’t publish the campaign. Please try again.

success.title: Campaign launched!
success.subtitle: ‘{{name}}’ is now live.
success.notifyBody: The Frak ambassador community will receive a push notification on the app: “{{merchant}}” has just launched a new campaign — they can start sharing immediately.
success.tipsSubtitle: The most effective campaigns use multiple touchpoints. Make sure you're activating all the levers:
success.tip1Desc: Add a sharing CTA right on the product page.
success.tip2Desc: Add the sharing banner right after checkout.
success.tip3Desc: Announce the campaign to your existing customer base.

cancel.title: Close draft without saving it?
cancel.description: Closing this draft without saving it means you will lose all the information you filled up.

goals.info: You can only choose one goal per campaign, it determines which action triggers reward distribution.

sales.title: Sales
sales.description: Find people likely to subscribe or buy product on a pay-per-view basis.

traffic.title: Traffic
traffic.description: Redirect to a destination, such as your website, application...

registration.title: Registration
registration.description: Create more registrations on your website for more qualified data.

currency.label: Reward currency (what users earn)
currency.description: The currency your ambassadors will receive as rewards.
currency.chooseAnotherDescription: Override the merchant default for this campaign

card.label: Territory
card.description: Choose one or several countries where your campaign will be displayed.

special.label: Special advertising categories
special.description: Declare whether your ads concern credit, employment, housing or a social, electoral or political issue.
special.notSupported: Special advertising categories are not supported yet

credit.title: Credit
credit.description: Advertisements for credit card offers, car loans, long-term financing or similar offers.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.description: Advertisements for job offers, internships, professional certification programs or other similar offers.

housing.title: Housing
housing.description: Advertisements for real estate ads, home insurance, mortgages or similar offers.

social.title: Social, electoral or political issues
social.description: Advertisements concerning social issues, elections, or political figures or campaigns.

cap.label: Budget cap
cap.hint: Total budget for the entire campaign. Stops when exhausted.

schedule.label: Schedule
schedule.description: If you don’t set an end date, the campaign stops when the budget is exhausted.
schedule.endDateInvalid: End date must be on or after the start date

referral.title: Referral campaign
referral.description: Only reward users who were referred by another user

model.label: Reward model
model.description: How rewards are calculated for each successful referral

fixed.title: Fixed amount
fixed.description: Set a fixed reward per conversion

value.label: Reward value
value.description: How much each person receives per conversion

cpa.hint: Total cost you pay per confirmed conversion. Frak takes 20% — the rest goes to your users.
cpa.reco: Frak recommends an <highlight>80/20 reward</highlight> split in favor of the Ambassador.
cpa.splitMismatch: Ambassador + Referee must add up to {{amount}} (the rewards pool).

percentage.recipientHint: % of the order value paid to this person.

tiered.incomplete: Each tier needs a basket range and a CPA above 0
tiered.overlap: Tiers can't overlap — each basket range must start where the previous one ends.

eligibility.label: Eligibility
eligibility.description: Which purchases qualify for a reward
eligibility.minPurchaseHint: Set to 0 to accept any order value.

lockup.label: Reward lockup
lockup.description: Refund protection — delay before rewards are released
lockup.info: Rewards are held for a grace period after purchase. If the order is refunded during this window, no reward is paid out — protecting your campaign budget.
lockup.durationHint: Set to 0 to release rewards immediately after purchase.

bulk.confirmPause_one: Are you sure you want to pause {{count}} campaign?
bulk.confirmPause_other: Are you sure you want to pause {{count}} campaigns?
bulk.confirmArchive_one: Are you sure you want to archive {{count}} campaign?
bulk.confirmArchive_other: Are you sure you want to archive {{count}} campaigns?
bulk.confirmDelete_one: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} campaign?
bulk.confirmDelete_other: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} campaigns?

actions.confirmPause: Are you sure you want to pause the campaign {{name}}?
actions.confirmResume: Are you sure you want to resume the campaign {{name}}?
actions.confirmArchive: Are you sure you want to archive the campaign {{name}}?
actions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete the campaign {{name}}?

trigger.title: What earns a reward
trigger.description: The action a customer must complete for rewards to be distributed.
trigger.create_referral_link: A user creates a sharing link

rewards.title: Rewards

recipientHint.referrer: The person who shared and brought in the customer
recipientHint.referee: The new customer who was referred

rewards.chainingDetail: {{decay}}% decay per level · up to {{depth}} levels

conditions.title: Conditions
conditions.description: Extra rules that must be met for the reward to apply.
conditions.none: No extra conditions — rewards apply to every qualifying action.

banner.depleted: Your reward bank is empty — rewards can't be distributed.
banner.paused: Your reward bank is paused — distribution is stopped.
banner.warning: Your reward bank needs attention — check your balance and spending authorization.
banner.notDeployed: Your reward bank isn't set up yet.

header.addFundsDescription: Top up your reward budget. Stripe handles the amount and payment method.

budget.distributingTooltip: When enabled, rewards are automatically distributed to your users through active campaigns. Disabling stops all new distributions.
budget.noFundsCaption: No funds — add funds to start distributing rewards.
budget.emptyWarning: Your bank has no funds. Active campaigns cannot distribute rewards until you add funds.

actions.withdrawTooltip: Sends your bank's available funds back to your wallet. Available because reward distribution is off.

setup.description: Set up your reward budget to start distributing rewards to your users.

funding.error: Failed to load reward budget data.

legacy.title: Legacy Bank Migration
legacy.description: Your old campaign bank still holds funds. Migrate them to your new bank to continue distributing rewards.

demo.label: Enable Demo Mode
demo.description: When enabled, all data will be replaced with mock data for demonstration purposes. This is useful for presentations and testing without affecting real data.

info.label: Invoice information
info.title: Invoice information
info.subtitle: Billing details used across all campaign invoices and statements.

sheet.description: These details will be used to generate all invoices and billing documents.

registration.label: Merchant registration
registration.title: Merchant registration
registration.subtitle: Register your merchant on the blockchain

name.label: Enter a Merchant Name
name.minLength: Merchant name must be at least 2 characters

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: The default currency for your campaigns

domain.label: Domain Configuration
domain.invalid: Please enter a valid domain (e.g., example.com)
domain.alreadyRegistered: A merchant already exists for the domain {{domain}}
domain.dnsNotSet: The DNS TXT record is not set, or the setup code is invalid

currencyInfo.moneriumDescription: Best for easy IBAN transfers. Your users can fund their wallets directly via bank transfer, making it simple for non-crypto users.
currencyInfo.circleDescription: Best for blockchain-native users. Widely used across DeFi platforms and exchanges.

dns.title: DNS TXT Record Required
dns.helper: Add this TXT record to your domain's DNS settings:
dns.helpQuestion: How to add a DNS TXT record in my DNS settings?
dns.helpBody: Adding a DNS TXT record verifies that you own this domain. The process varies depending on your DNS provider (e.g., Cloudflare, GoDaddy, Namecheap). For detailed step-by-step instructions, please visit our documentation:

summary.label: Summary
summary.description: Review the information that will be registered on-chain.
summary.name: Merchant Name

instructions.onChain: Your merchant will be registered on-chain.
instructions.approve: You'll be asked to approve the transaction using your wallet.
instructions.duration: Registration usually takes less than a minute

setupStatus.title: Merchant setup status
setupStatus.success: Great job! Your merchant is set up correctly.

merchantEdit.title: Edit
merchantEdit.saveError: Some changes could not be saved. Check the fields and try again.

discard.title: Discard changes?
discard.description: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?

domains.title: Allowed domains
domains.description: Additional domains authorized to access this merchant (e.g. Shopify myshopify.com domains).

newsletter.title: Newsletter sharing link
newsletter.description: Paste this link into your newsletter or any marketing email. When a customer clicks it, your storefront opens with the Frak sharing modal, pre-filled with your current campaign rewards, so they can share and earn in one tap.

explorer.title: Explorer
explorer.heroHint: The main image shown at the top of your Explorer page.
explorer.additionalHeroHint: Up to 4 extra images shown as a slider after the main one.

restrictions.logo: PNG, JPEG, WebP, SVG, GIF — Min 128×128px — Ratio 1:2 to 2:1 (Max 10MB)
restrictions.hero: PNG, JPEG, WebP, SVG, GIF — Min 800×450px — Ratio 4:3 to 2:1 (Max 10MB)
restrictions.icon: PNG, JPEG, WebP, SVG, GIF — Min 64×64px — Ratio 1:2 to 2:1 (Max 10MB)

purchaseTracker.title: Purchase tracker
purchaseTracker.description: Track purchases from your store to power campaigns and distribute rewards.

sheet.description: Configure how Frak receives purchase events from your store.
sheet.registerHint: Then register it on Frak with this button.

change.title: Change platform?
change.description: This could break your purchase tracking. Are you sure you want to change the platform?
change.internalWarning: You won't be able to revert back from this dashboard — you would need to set up the webhook again from the platform application (like the Shopify Frak app).

instructions.shopify: To register the webhook on Shopify, go to your Shopify admin console, then <italic>Settings > Notifications > Webhook</italic>. Create a new webhook with the <italic>Order Updated</italic> event using the URL below:
instructions.woocommerce: To register the webhook on WooCommerce, go to your WordPress admin console, then <italic>WooCommerce > Settings > Advanced > Webhooks</italic>. Create a new webhook with the <italic>Order Updated</italic> topic using the URL and secret below:
instructions.magento: To register the webhook on Adobe Commerce (Magento 2), install the <doc>frak-labs/magento2-module</doc> Composer package, then in your Magento admin console open <italic>Stores > Configuration > Frak > Webhook Secret</italic> and paste the secret below:
instructions.custom: To use this webhook on your website, please refer to the <doc>documentation</doc>.
instructions.internal1: Your merchant is already registered on Frak using an internal webhook. This usually means you are using one of our third-party applications, like the Shopify app or the WordPress plugin.
instructions.internal2: If you think that's a mistake, you can switch to a manual setup using the selector above.

shopify.keyPlaceholder: Copy the signature shown at the bottom of the webhooks list in your Shopify panel

editMerchant.title: Edit merchant
editMerchant.description: Update your merchant name and default reward currency.
editMerchant.name: Merchant name

team.saveError: Some changes could not be saved. Try again.

add.title: Add a member
add.description: Invite an admin to your team by wallet address.
add.label: Member wallet
add.error: Could not add the admin. Try again.

name.label: Name
name.hint: Your brand name as shown to visitors in the SDK components

logo.label: Logo
logo.hint: Your logo image, displayed alongside your name in SDK components

homepage.label: Homepage Link
homepage.hint: Your website URL, used when visitors click your brand name

currency.label: Currency
currency.hint: Currency used to display reward amounts

lang.label: Language
lang.hint: Language for SDK text. Auto detects from the visitor's browser.

displayed.title: Frak SDK displayed
displayed.description: When off, the SDK is completely hidden from visitors

placements.title: SDK Customization
placements.description: Global defaults apply to every SDK component. Placements are variants you can use on the same website to display your products in different ways — each with its own text, styles, and behavior.

dialog.title: Create placement
dialog.hint: Placement id must be unique and use 3 to 16 characters.

settings.title: Placement settings · {{placementId}}
settings.description: Text, styles and behavior overrides for this placement.

css.title: Placement CSS · {{placementId}}
css.description: Global CSS overrides for this placement. Styles defined here apply to all SDK components within this placement.

delete.title: Delete placement · {{placementId}}
delete.hint: This removes all overrides for this placement.
delete.description: This will remove all overrides for placement {{placementId}}.

components.title: Global component defaults
components.description: Choose the wording that best matches your brand for each component.

rewardToken.hint: Tip: insert <token>{REWARD}</token> in any text to show the live campaign reward.

image.label: Illustration
image.description: Replace the default gift icon with your own image.
image.hint: Paste an image URL or upload one below.

targetInteraction.label: Target interaction
targetInteraction.hint: Event name that triggers reward calculation for this placement (e.g. purchase_completed, signup)

globalCss.title: Global CSS
globalCss.description: CSS styles applied to all SDK components across every placement. Placement-level CSS can override these defaults.

mint.title: Register your shop on Frak
mint.error: Can't register your product. Double check that everything is right.
mint.alreadyRegistered: Maybe the domain is already registered.

welcomePopup.title: 🚀 Your new Frak dashboard is here
welcomePopup.description: We've redesigned the Frak dashboard to make campaign management and performance tracking simpler than ever.
